column5436: }\" Description=\"\t1. Collaboration Across Business Partners - Establish feedback loop for execution of activities relative to holiday and seasonal pricing and modular strategies. Utilize weekly meetings to promote engagement around activity and projects that will drive communications. Partner with leadership to promote Merchant Message in broadcasts and communications.&#xA
column5437: \t2. Innovation - Seamless implementation of AMP 2.0 for all business areas. Utilize Me@ enhancements to promote modular and pricing execution. Explore new technology and methodologies to improve communication needs in Supply chain, and enhance the project intake process to create a clear project flow with seamless project hand-offs across all phases and improved visibility. Iterate with speed when new opportunities are identified. &#xA
column5438: \t3. Communication - Continued focus on reduction in activity and communication by bundling activity when applicable and Playbook/Guide Reinvention. Implement accurate auto feed. Re-design of Me@ inbox to ensure clear, user-friendly notifications.&#xA
column5439: \t4. Monitor Activities - Create activity reporting by store/market/region/BU accessible by desktop and Me@. Monitor execution of modular and pricing completion. Provide training materials and road shows to encourage engagement and adoption. Establish a funnel for new projects to simplify creation, visibility and tracking.&#xA

,,Event Criteria - the information you normally need or want to take about each event.
•	Event Name – This will be assigned at the beginning of each event.  For Hurricanes it will start when the storm is named.
•	Store – Will need update each store individually
•	Event Start Date – Will use the date that we are first activated
•	Event End Date – Will use the date of the last day of activation
•	Event Type (hurricane, tornado, etc)
o	Hurricane
o	Tornado
o	Severe Weather
o	Flood
o	Wildfire
o	Fire
o	Arson
o	Winter Weather
o	Civil Unrest
o	Protest
o	Loss of Infrastructure
o	Police Activity
o	Volcano
•	Store – Will need update each store individually
Event Service Updates
•	Event Name
•	ESF Team/#
o	ESF1 – People
o	ESF2 – Ops Support
o	ESF3 – Emergency Management
o	ESF4 – Facilities Services
o	ESF5 – Merchandise
o	ESF6 – Supply Chain
o	ESF7 – AP
o	ESF8 – Tech
o	ESF9 – Corp Affairs
o	ESF10 – Walmart.org
•	Service Type ( text Field, so they can input anything)
•	Service Update Title
•	Service Update Details
•	Service Update Timestamp

",,,"Randi.Merrill@walmart.com","High","https://confluence.walmart.com/display/CTP/CMS2.0+ChangeLogs+for+CRQs",,,"False",,"FOS","False",,"Features
The landing page won't render expired messages unless the expired tab is selected
This does not include messages that were soft deleted due to a change in message start date
Attachments are now a part of change requests
Previously, Submitters could upload attachments and bypass the change request specifically for attachments
Change Requests
If a change request is approved, the old value will no longer show up in the modal, but if it is denied the previous value will still show up
This change is to reduce costs in relation to our database storage, we have seen bugs arise due to the large sizes of data, so this change will help prevent that
Ability to create a Change Request for Co-Author
Bugs
Fixed bug where if legal requirement is removed from an autofeed, user in ATC could not approve the message in Final ATC
Fixed bug where if a user changes the date on a message, the previous version of the message would show up in the landing page
Fixed bug where if a published verification message that is overdue is updated, it won't update the message based on the data in the 0th partition
Fixed bug where co-authors were able to make changes on a message in business review
Fixed bug where invalid stores pop up would not work properly
The modal wouldn't show up even when there were invalid stores
Fixed bug with expired/old partition messages showing up on the landing page
Fixed bug where making an update on an overdue verify message it would create a new message due to using the document in the 0th partition
Fixed bug where drag and drop for relative week attachments didn't work
